zh.Holton cum Beckering, Lincolnshire, Engl: 英國林可爾史爾霍爾頓 姆 貝可林
zh.Holton-cum-Beckering, Lincolnshire, Engl: 英國英格蘭林可爾史爾霍爾頓 姆 貝可林
zh.lifeSummary: 當Rogyll Ruggles於1444年出生在英國林可爾史爾霍爾頓 姆 貝可林時，他的父親Thomas Ruggles34歲，母親Olive Powers30歲。他於1469年與Maude Dexter在英國林可爾史爾霍爾頓 姆 貝可林結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1469年在英國英格蘭享年25歲，埋葬在英國林可爾史爾霍爾頓 姆 貝可林。

nameMeanings.name: Ruggles
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Essex): variant of the now extinct surname Ruggle, with post-medieval excrescent -s. The origin of Ruggle is uncertain. It could be a variant of the Suffolk and Essex name Ricold with voicing of /k/ to /g/ and the same vowel change as seen in Smoothy for Smithey (another Suffolk and Essex name) and in Puckering for Pickering .
History: The founder of this influential American family was Thomas Ruggles (1584–1644) of Sudbury, Suffolk, England, who settled in Roxbury, MA, in 1637.

variants.name: Smithey
meanings: English (Yorkshire): from Middle English smithi ‘smithy, forge’ (Old Norse smithja), used either as a topographic name for someone who lived in or by a blacksmith's shop, or an occupational name for someone who worked in one. Compare Smith and Smead .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Rogyll Ruggles was born in 1444, in Holton cum Beckering, Lincolnshire, England, his father, Thomas Ruggles, was 34 and his mother, Olive Powers, was 30. He married Maude Dexter in 1469, in Holton cum Beckering, Lincolnshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1469, in England, United Kingdom, at the age of 25, and was buried in Holton cum Beckering, Lincolnshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Rogyll Ruggles est né en 1444, à Holton cum Beckering, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Ruggles, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Olive Powers, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Maude Dexter en 1469, à Holton cum Beckering, Lincolnshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1469, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 25 ans, et a été enterré à Holton cum Beckering, Lincolnshire, Angleterre.

Er hat 1469 in Holton cum Beckering, Lincolnshire, England Maude Dexter geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1469 im Alter von 25 Jahren in England, United Kingdom und wurde in Holton cum Beckering, Lincolnshire, England begraben.

Lui sposato Maude Dexter nel 1469, nel Holton cum Beckering, Lincolnshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. ja.Holton-cum-Beckering, Lincolnshire, Engl: イギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアホルトン クウム ベッカーイング
ja.lifeSummary: Rogyll Rugglesが1444年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアホルトン クウム ベッカーイングで生まれた時，父Thomas Rugglesは34歳，母Olive Powersは30歳であった。1469年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアホルトン クウム ベッカーイングでMaude Dexterと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1469年にイギリスイギリスで25歳で死去し，イギリスリンコルンシュアイアホルトン クウム ベッカーイングにて埋葬された。

ko.Holton-cum-Beckering, Lincolnshire, Engl: 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 홀턴 c 벡링
ko.lifeSummary: Rogyll Ruggles(이)가 1444년 영국 링코실르 홀턴 c 벡링에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Ruggles(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Olive Powers(은)는 30세였다. 그는 1469년 영국 링코실르 홀턴 c 벡링에서 Maude Dexter(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1469년 영국 잉글랜드에서 25세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 링코실르 홀턴 c 벡링에 묻혔다.

Ele casou-se com Maude Dexter em 1469, em Holton cum Beckering, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. ru.Holton-cum-Beckering, Lincolnshire, Engl: холтон кум беккиринг, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Rogyll Ruggles родился в 1444 г. в местности холтон кум беккиринг, линколншир, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Ruggles было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Olive Powers, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Maude Dexter в 1469 г. в местности холтон кум беккиринг, линколншир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1469 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 25 лет и был похоронен в местности холтон кум беккиринг, линколншир, Англия.
